prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Ford Modular V8 (4.6L DOHC 32V *WAP* engine code) with a Roush-Yates CNC-ported aluminum block bored to 5.0L, featuring forged Mahle pistons (2618 alloy, 12.5:1 CR), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet steel crankshaft with 3.620" stroke. Pair with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Dailey Engineering (4-stage pump, 10-quart reservoir) to eliminate oil starvation under sustained 2.5G lateral loads.

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (88mm compressor, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm, dual-port) and a Tial MV-R 60mm blow-off valve. Fabricate a bespoke air-to-water intercooler system using a PWR core (12" x 24" x 4.5") with dual Bosch 160L/min water pumps and a 5-gallon ice reservoir for track endurance. Tune via a MoTeC M190 ECU with custom fuel maps for VP Racing Q16 (116 octane) and methanol injection (AEM 340LPH pump, Snow Performance Stage 3 kit).

Drivetrain: Swap the stock Tremec T-56 6-speed for a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (dog-ring engagement, 1.5-second shifts) with a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch (8.5" diameter, 3,000 lb-ft capacity). Install a Quaife ATB differential (45% lock) in a custom billet aluminum housing, paired with 300M axles from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" diameter, 1450HP rating). Use a Panoz-specific bellhousing adapter plate to mate the Holinger to the Roush-Yates block.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Replace the stock body with a custom carbon-fiber widebody kit by Fiberworks (Panoz GTR-1 LM spec), featuring a 3D-scanned Le Mans-style front splitter with integrated dive planes (adjustable 0-15 degrees), a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (AEM VCU-controlled), and a fixed rear wing (NACA 63A012 airfoil, 1.2m chord, 30-degree angle of attack). Install a custom underbody tray with vortex generators to reduce lift by 40% at 180 mph.

Lightweighting: Replace all glass with Lexan polycarbonate (SABIC Lexan EXL, 3mm thick) from Vacuum Bagging Technologies, saving 45 lbs. Install a custom titanium roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 1.75" x 0.120" wall thickness) by The Chassis Shop, featuring integrated fire suppression mounts (Lifeline Zero 360 system) and a removable center section for engine access. Use BBS FI-R wheels (18x12 front, 18x13 rear) with titanium lug nuts (ARP 625+) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (335/30/18 front, 345/30/18 rear).

Exterior Finishing: Apply a custom livery using 3M 1080 vinyl (Matte Anthracite with Gloss Black accents) by Vinyl Frog, featuring hand-painted gold leaf pinstriping (24K, 1mm width) by Signarama. Install a custom LED lighting system (Lucid Vision, 6,000-lumen output) with sequential turn signals and a rear light bar (Osram Oslon Black Flat, 120W) integrated into the diffuser. Use a custom titanium exhaust system (3" diameter, 304 stainless steel, Inconel 625 tips) by Burns Stainless, exiting through the rear diffuser for improved aerodynamics.
